candidates.title: [3.14] gh-145870: Fix Format.SOURCE reference in get_annotations docstring (GH-145889)
candidates.body:
The get_annotations() docstring incorrectly referred to the SOURCE
format, which was renamed to STRING during PEP 749 development.
(cherry picked from commit 2a0fa500f82fc160feb726c0631f58c9a2f76796)

Co-authored-by: wavebyrd <160968744+wavebyrd@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Carson Jones <carson@Carsons-MacBook-Pro.local>

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-145870 -->
* Issue: gh-145870
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

candidates.title: [3.10] gh-145599, CVE 2026-3644: Reject control characters in `http.cookies.Morsel.update()` (#145600)
candidates.body:
Reject control characters in `http.cookies.Morsel.update()` and `http.cookies.BaseCookie.js_output`.

(cherry picked from commit 57e88c1cf95e1481b94ae57abe1010469d47a6b4)

# Pull Request title

It should be in the following format:

```
gh-NNNNNN: Summary of the changes made
```

Where: gh-NNNNNN refers to the GitHub issue number.

Most PRs will require an issue number. Trivial changes, like fixing a typo, do not need an issue.

# Backport Pull Request title

If this is a backport PR (PR made against branches other than `main`),
please ensure that the PR title is in the following format:

```
[X.Y] <title from the original PR> (GH-NNNNNN)
```

Where: [X.Y] is the branch name, for example: [3.13].

GH-NNNNNN refers to the PR number from `main`.

-->

<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

candidates.title: [3.12] gh-145548: Use VMADDR_CID_LOCAL in VSOCK socket tests (GH-145589)
candidates.body:
Prefer VMADDR_CID_LOCAL instead of VMADDR_CID_ANY for bind() in the
server. Skip the test if bind() fails with EADDRNOTAVAIL.

Log vsock CID in test.pythoninfo.
(cherry picked from commit 6c8c72f7feb4207c62ac857443943e61977d6a94)

Includes fix-up from 26326a0b4fef5452a72275a548d1bd13f0e10ccd (GH-145735)

Co-authored-by: Victor Stinner <vstinner@python.org>

candidates.title: [3.10] gh-144370: Disallow usage of control characters in status in wsgiref.handlers for security (#144371)
candidates.body:
Disallow usage of control characters in status in wsgiref.handlers to prevent HTTP header injections.



(cherry picked from commit d931725bc850cd096f6703bc285e885f1e015f05)
